scenarioCreation.initial: Create a scenario that researches family members using OpenAI, generates Hebrew insurance profiles, and creates Surense leads
scenarioCreation.detailed: Set up a workflow that takes client ID and family member IDs as input, researches each member using OpenAI for insurance profiling, generates comprehensive Hebrew family insurance profiles, and creates leads in Surense with uploaded documents
scenarioCreation.simple: Build an automation that creates professional Hebrew family insurance documents and uploads them to Surense

moduleConfiguration.trigger: Set up a manual trigger with client ID and family member IDs input fields
moduleConfiguration.openai: Configure the OpenAI module to research family members for insurance profiling with comprehensive analysis
moduleConfiguration.surense: Set up the Surense module to create leads with family research data and upload documents
moduleConfiguration.webhook: Configure a webhook to update the customer portal when research is complete

contentGeneration.template: Write a professional Hebrew family insurance profile template with executive summary, family overview, individual analysis, and recommendations
contentGeneration.prompts: Generate OpenAI prompts for comprehensive family member research including personal info, financial situation, insurance needs, and risk factors
contentGeneration.email: Create a professional email template for sending completed family insurance profiles to clients

errorHandling.api: Help me fix the Surense API connection error
errorHandling.token: Resolve the OpenAI token limit issue in the research module
errorHandling.mapping: Fix the document upload mapping error between OpenAI and Surense modules

optimization.performance: How can I optimize this family research workflow for better performance?
optimization.cost: What can I do to reduce OpenAI API costs in this workflow?
optimization.reliability: How can I make this workflow more reliable and handle errors better?
